selected_important_turn.why_important: This is an early, concrete concession of a highly valued resource right after the opponent threatened to walk away. It materially alters the negotiation trajectory (it de-escalates an exit threat and can determine whether a deal remains possible).
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The offer (only 1 firewood) is underspecified and very small relative to the stated urgency; it misses a chance to open an integrative exchange (e.g., ask how much they need, propose a trade package or conditional concession). As phrased it risks being perceived as tokenistic and doesn’t create clear reciprocal obligations or tradeoffs.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Rather than a minimal unilateral concession, first ask a clarifying question about their critical need (how much firewood they need/how urgent), then propose a conditional or package offer that trades resources (e.g., you take X of firewood now in exchange for them leaving some food/water, or offer a temporary loan). Make the concession proportional and tied to a clear trade so it creates reciprocity.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (by enabling trade-based, conditional deals rather than token concessions)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (by creating clearer give-and-take rather than one-sided concessions)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (clarity and reciprocity reduce misunderstandings and allow a stable agreement)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: increase (showing empathy plus structured reciprocity builds trust more than a tiny unilateral give)

value2reason.Low: I need a few packages of food to give me energy to keep going.
value2reason.Medium: Camping can be very involving so i need water to keep me hydrated at all times.
value2reason.High: I understand it is usually very cold up there therefore i will need a lot of firewood to ensure the fire never goes off. Also it is good for security as it keeps animals away.

value2reason.Low: It gets very hot and sunny during the day
value2reason.Medium: We are bringing a big group of people camping
value2reason.High: It gets very cold at night

dialogue.text: Hi . How is your camping trip going?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The trip is great, how about you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: It is great too. However i am feeling very cold i need a lot of firewood to light a fire.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: We have -10 degrees temperatures at night where I am camping!!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: It is even worse here and I am not feeling well
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am just going to walk away from the deal,  my family can't freeze
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: You can take 1 firewood then
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I can't leave without firewood. Let's split the 3 firewood packages evenly. That way we both stay warm. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand the urgency. How much firewood do you need to stay warm? I'm willing to offer 2 firewood packages if you agree to share 1 water package with me.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 firewood packages to stay warm. If you take 2, I'll give you 1 water package. Let's split the remaining 1 firewood and 2 water packages evenly.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
